general: DeFT introduces a hardware-efficient attention algorithm for tree-based LLM inference, improving KV cache reuse and GPU utilization.
上下文与缓存优化: DeFT reduces read/write operations by KV-Guided Grouping, avoiding repeatedly loading KV cache of shared prefixes during attention computation.
系统与调度优化: Flattened Tree KV Splitting balances KV cache partitions, ensuring even distribution and reducing redundant computation while boosting GPU utilization.

codex_annotation.notes: Based on the abstract, DeFT targets KV cache reuse and load-balanced attention partitions for tree-structured LLM inference workloads.

模型压缩: We propose a method for the joint compression of LoRAs into a shared basis paired with LoRA-specific scaling matrices.
We extend our algorithm to learn clusters of LoRAs that are amenable to joint compression, allowing it to scale gracefully to large LoRA collections.
general: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) with low-rank adaptations (LoRAs) has become common practice, often yielding numerous copies of the same LLM differing only in their LoRA updates.
Compressed LoRAs preserve performance while offering major throughput gains in realistic serving scenarios with over a thousand LoRAs, maintaining 80% of the throughput of serving a single LoRA.

codex_annotation.notes: 圍繞 LoRA 服務的瓶頸在於記憶體與吞吐，作者以壓縮方法讓成千上萬個 LoRA 共用基底後端放縮，重點在模型壓縮進行服務擴展。

解码策略优化: SpecEdge splits LLM workloads between edge and server GPUs using a speculative decoding scheme and proactive edge drafting to overlap edge token creation with server verification.
系统与调度优化: Pipeline-aware scheduling interleaves multiple user requests to increase server-side throughput, enabling a 1.91× cost efficiency improvement and 11.24% latency reduction compared to server-only baselines.
general: SpecEdge is an edge-assisted inference framework that exchanges only token outputs over the network to tap consumer-grade GPUs and deliver scalable, cost-effective LLM serving.

codex_annotation.notes: Edge and server GPUs cooperate via speculative decoding plus pipeline scheduling to boost throughput and cut token latency.

general: Sorbet 是一个面向受限设备、通过能效提升实现语言模型推理的 neuromorphic Transformer，摘要聚焦其硬件兼容性与能耗显著下降，定位为推理优化工作。
算子与内核优化: Sorbet 引入 PTsoftmax 与 BitShifting-based PowerNorm (BSPN) 来替代软max 和层归一化等能量密集操作，说明核心贡献在于可在 neuromorphic 硬件上实现的新算子。
模型压缩: 通过知识蒸馏与量化，Sorbet 打造成高度压缩的二值权重模型，在保持性能的同时实现 27.16× 能耗节约，表明另一主贡献是模型压缩优化。

codex_annotation.notes: 基于摘要，Sorbet 同时提出神经元友好的新算子和压缩手段，都是主干优化点，故包含两个偏好标签。

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是面向边缘部署的脉冲神经网络语言模型推理优化，明确包含量化/二值权重压缩；同时通过 PTsoftmax 与 BSPN 替换高能耗操作，属于推理侧算子优化。未见明显关于上下文缓存、解码策略或系统调度层面的贡献。

general: Reasoning Language Model Inference Serving Unveiled: An Empirical Study
The reasoning large language model (RLLM) has been proven competitive in solving complex reasoning tasks such as mathematics, coding, compared to traditional LLM.
negative: 标题与摘要强调经验性比较研究，未提出或验证新的优化方法，因此不满足偏好标签的条件。

codex_annotation.notes: 仅依靠摘要信息，无法判断具体优化贡献；若后续补充具体方法，可重新评估。

human_annotation.notes: 论文主题更接近RLLM推理服务的实证研究，目标方向可归为系统与调度优化，但当前摘要证据不足以支持标注为具体偏好正例。

general: QuantSpec is a self-speculative decoding framework for long-context LLM inference that uses hierarchical 4-bit quantized KV cache and weights to accelerate decoding with high acceptance rates.
解码策略优化: The draft model shares the target architecture but uses quantized caches in a self-speculative decoding workflow, achieving consistent end-to-end speedups up to ∼2.5×.
上下文与缓存优化: Hierarchical 4-bit quantized KV cache reduces memory and KV cache loading overheads, improving latency/memory compared to sparse KV cache alternatives for long-context inference.

codex_annotation.notes: Speculative decoding is the primary innovation while hierarchical quantized KV caching targets long-context cache efficiency on edge devices.

human_annotation.notes: ['论文核心是面向长上下文 LLM 推理的自推测解码，并以量化 KV cache/权重实现加速与降内存。', '未见算子/内核级实现细节，也不以系统调度为主要贡献，因此未标注系统与调度优化、算子与内核优化。']

general: CDPruner defines conditional similarity between visual tokens and reformulates pruning with determinantal point processes to maximize conditional diversity, making the training-free, model-agnostic method broadly applicable to MLLMs while retaining strong accuracy.
Applying CDPruner to LLaVA reduces FLOPs by 95% and CUDA latency by 78% while maintaining 94% of original accuracy, showing the method concretely improves inference efficiency.
上下文与缓存优化: Current approaches remove redundant visual tokens, but CDPruner instead maximizes the conditional diversity of retained visual tokens so that pruning better represents inputs while adhering to instructions, reducing inference cost of long visual contexts.

codex_annotation.notes: Token pruning via CDPruner directly targets long-context visual tokens in MLLMs, yielding large FLOPs/latency savings through instruction-aware subset selection.

human_annotation.notes: ['论文核心是面向 MLLM 推理阶段的视觉 token pruning，属于多模态 LLM 推理优化。', '方法是 training-free 的输入 token 子集选择，不涉及内核实现或系统调度本身，也不是典型权重量化/蒸馏式模型压缩。']

general: 摘要只提到通过视觉思维补充语言推理以提升多模态大模型的空间推理能力，并未描述任何解码策略、上下文缓存、系统调度、算子内核、结构或压缩等优化方法。

codex_annotation.notes: 缺乏明确的偏好优化方法描述，因而判定为 negative。

human_annotation.notes: 标题直接强调 Dynamic and Asymmetric Routing，属于面向多模态推理路径的结构/路由优化；摘要未体现缓存、调度、算子内核或压缩重点。

general: MagicDec identifies bottleneck shifts with batch size and length to deploy SD effectively for high-throughput inference.
Theoretical model selects the optimal drafting strategy for maximum speedup.
解码策略优化: Speculative decoding still speeds up high-throughput inference and MagicDec deploys SD more effectively for large batches and lengths.
上下文与缓存优化: Sparse KV cache on the draft model addresses bottlenecks scaling with sequence length and batch size.

codex_annotation.notes: MagicDec combines SD tuning with sparse KV cache drafting to improve the latency-throughput tradeoff for long-context LLM serving.

human_annotation.notes: 该论文明确属于 LLM 推理优化，且同时覆盖解码策略、KV/上下文缓存以及面向高吞吐服务的系统级部署优化。

general: CogVLA proposes a cognition-aligned VLA framework that leverages instruction-driven routing and sparsification through a three-stage progressive architecture to improve efficiency and performance.
模型结构侧推理优化: The three stages—EFA-Routing, LFP-Routing, and V-L-A Coupled Attention—inject instruction information, prune instruction-irrelevant visually grounded tokens, and combine causal vision-language attention with bidirectional action parallel decoding, highlighting new inference-focused routing/attention structures.

codex_annotation.notes: Instruction-driven routing and sparsification reshape the inference pipeline of VLM-based VLA models, so the key optimization lies in the inference structure rather than kernel or system tweaks.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是通过指令驱动路由、token 压缩与剪枝来降低 VLA/VLM 推理开销，并用耦合注意力维持动作生成质量，属于明显的推理结构优化，并伴随压缩/稀疏化特征。

codex_annotation.primary_research_object: 检索 / 推荐 / 搜索

general: SLMRec distills large recommendation-focused LLMs into much smaller language models by pruning redundant intermediate layers, enabling sequential recommendation on industry datasets with just 13% of the parameters yet comparable performance and large training/inference speedups as a result of the compression-focused design. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/58ab3d5ad04589543889118f80654279-Abstract-Conference.html?utm_source=openai))
模型压缩: A simple yet effective knowledge distillation method empowers the small language model to inherit the LLM’s capabilities while keeping only a fraction of the parameters (13%) and obtaining up to 6.6×/8.0× training/inference speedups, making compression the core contribution. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/58ab3d5ad04589543889118f80654279-Abstract-Conference.html?utm_source=openai))

codex_annotation.notes: Distillation-based compression of the teacher LLM is the main contribution; no other optimization categories are claimed. ([proceedings.iclr.cc](https://proceedings.iclr.cc/paper_files/paper/2025/hash/58ab3d5ad04589543889118f80654279-Abstract-Conference.html?utm_source=openai))

human_annotation.notes: 题目明确是序列推荐；“Distilling ... into Small”直接表明通过蒸馏将大模型压缩为小模型，归入模型压缩。

上下文与缓存优化: Abstract: Sparse RAG encodes retrieved documents in parallel, eliminating latency from long-range attention of retrieved documents, and then LLMs selectively decode by only attending to highly relevant caches chosen via prompting with special control tokens, which reduces the number of documents loaded during decoding to accelerate inference.

codex_annotation.notes: Sparse RAG’s sparse context selection and cache-aware decoding explicitly optimize the context/caching pathway for RAG inference, balancing quality and efficiency.

general: 这是RAG检索的优化，不是模型推理加速

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是通过稀疏上下文选择与按需访问相关缓存来加速 RAG 推理，重点落在解码阶段的注意力裁剪与上下文/缓存利用优化；未体现模型压缩。

general: Delta correction aligns sparse attention outputs with quadratic attention to recover 88% of full accuracy while keeping ~98.5% sparsity and little overhead, enabling 32× speedup relative to Flash Attention 2 on 1M-token prefills.
算子与内核优化: The proposed procedure corrects the distributional shift introduced by sparse attention inference so decoding-time queries match prefill keys, yielding a 36ppt average performance boost when applied atop sliding-window attention with sink tokens.

codex_annotation.notes: Sparse attention inference algorithm adds a lightweight correction step to keep accuracy close to dense attention for long-context decoding.

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦 LLM 长上下文稀疏注意力推理，通过 delta correction 缓解 prefill-to-decoding 分布偏移；更偏向注意力/推理结构优化，并涉及长上下文阶段的 prefill-decoding 对齐。

general: Evaluation on the state-of-the-art text-to-image VAR model family, Infinity, demonstrates that our approach effectively reduces the required KV cache memory to 10% while preserving pixel-level fidelity.
上下文与缓存优化: To address these bottlenecks, we introduce ScaleKV, a novel KV cache compression framework tailored for VAR architectures.
ScaleKV optimizes the multi-scale inference pipeline by identifying scale-specific drafters and refiners, facilitating differentiated cache management tailored to each scale.

codex_annotation.notes: ScaleKV explicitly tackles the exponential KV cache growth in VAR inference via scale-aware cache compression aligned to layer roles.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是面向视觉自回归生成推理的 KV cache 压缩与分层/分尺度缓存管理，最匹配上下文与缓存优化；同时包含按层与按尺度进行差异化资源分配，符合系统与调度优化。未见解码策略本身改造、模型压缩训练或算子内核级优化。

算子与内核优化: We present CodeGEMM, a codebook-centric GEMM kernel that replaces dequantization with precomputed inner products between centroids and activations stored in a lightweight Psumbook.

codex_annotation.notes: CodeGEMM introduces a custom GEMM kernel that avoids per-element dequantization lookups by gathering precomputed partial sums from a Psumbook, clearly positioning it as an operator/kernel optimization for quantized LLM inference.

human_annotation.notes: ['论文核心贡献是面向量化 LLM 推理的 GEMM 内核设计，而非提出新的压缩方法本身。', '量化与 codebook 是问题设定与目标场景，因此更适合作为 target_preference_labels 中的“模型压缩”。']

general: PPE explicitly encodes 3D positions when compressing redundant visual tokens, allowing each merged token to preserve spatiotemporal structure and support cascade clustering that keeps performance on vision-language benchmarks.

The method is parameter-free, plugs into existing token merging frameworks, and consistently improves MMBench, TextVQA, and VideoMME, showing that preserving positional cues is critical for efficient MLLM reasoning.
上下文与缓存优化: The operator compresses visual tokens while keeping spatial layouts and temporal continuity so that cascade clustering can gradually reduce sequence length without disrupting positional relationships.

codex_annotation.notes: Focuses on token compression to shrink visual context and retain reasoning quality in multimodal LLMs.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是针对多模态大模型视觉token压缩时的结构保持与压缩算子设计，属于推理阶段的模型结构优化，而非系统调度优化。

上下文与缓存优化: SpeCache offloads the complete KV cache to large CPU memory and dynamically fetches KV pairs per decoding step based on their importance measured by a low-precision copy in VRAM.

To avoid latency from CPU-GPU communication, SpeCache speculatively predicts the KV pairs that the next token might attend to and prefetches them before the next decoding step, allowing parallel prefetching and computation.

codex_annotation.notes: SpeCache targets long-context LLM decoding by keeping full cache on CPU and speculatively prefetching hotspots, reducing VRAM pressure without retraining.

human_annotation.notes: ['核心贡献是 KV cache 的分层存储、按重要性回取与推测式预取，属于缓存优化并带有系统调度特征。', '虽然摘要提到 high KV cache compression ratio，但方法重点不是量化/剪枝式模型压缩，而是无遗忘的缓存卸载与预取。']

general: Star Attention在保持97-100%准确率的前提下，通过分布式块稀疏注意力将内存与推理时间压缩至最多11倍。
上下文与缓存优化: 第二阶段的sequence-global attention让query/response可直接访问此前缓存的所有token。
系统与调度优化: 第一阶段在多主机间并行地采用blockwise-local attention，并且最小化通信开销，实现了跨主机的注意力分片。

codex_annotation.notes: 摘要明确描述了面向长上下文的缓存式global attention优化和跨主机注意力分片系统架构；因此标注了对应的两项偏好标签。

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦长上下文LLM推理，通过块稀疏注意力、跨主机分片与缓存token全局访问联合优化推理效率，属于明显的正样本。

general: Title emphasizes "Dynamic Visual-Token Exit" as the acceleration mechanism for multimodal LLMs, pointing to an early-exit decoding strategy.
解码策略优化: The paper accelerates MLLMs via a dynamic visual-token exit, indicating a decoding strategy change to stop processing redundant visual tokens.

codex_annotation.notes: Based on the title and abstract fragment, the claimed contribution is early-exit decoding for multimodal tokens; no further label evidence seen.

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦多模态大模型推理阶段的动态视觉 token 退出，属于通过模型侧机制减少冗余计算的推理优化方向。

上下文与缓存优化: KV caching is a fundamental technique for accelerating LLM inference by reusing key-value pairs from previous queries, but its effectiveness under limited memory is highly sensitive to the eviction policy.

codex_annotation.notes: Abstract focuses on improving the KV eviction policy under memory constraints, which targets cache/context optimization.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心明确围绕 LLM 推理阶段的 KV cache 复用与受限内存下的淘汰策略优化；标题中的 query load balancing 也指向调度/负载均衡视角。

general: Transformer-based LLMs rely on KV caching to avoid redundant computation during autoregressive inference, but cache size becomes a bottleneck for long-context tasks.
LookaheadKV augments transformer layers with parameter-efficient modules trained to predict true importance scores with high accuracy while keeping runtime overhead negligible.
上下文与缓存优化: LookaheadKV is a lightweight eviction framework that leverages future-response prediction strength without costly draft generation to guide prompt KV eviction.

Extensive experiments show LookaheadKV reduces eviction cost by up to 14.5× and significantly accelerates time-to-first-token on long-context understanding benchmarks, outperforming recent baselines by 25%.

codex_annotation.notes: Evidence centers on LookaheadKV’s KV cache eviction modules that predict importance scores to achieve faster long-context inference with lower eviction cost.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是面向长上下文推理的 KV Cache eviction / compression 优化，直接对应上下文与缓存优化；未明显涉及解码策略或系统调度层面的核心方法贡献。

general: REFORM handles extremely long contexts by incrementally processing chunks while building cross-layer context embeddings and selectively recomputing a compressed KV cache, delivering large performance gains across benchmarks.
上下文与缓存优化: The first phase keeps a compressed KV cache and recomputes it selectively while gathering essential tokens via similarity matching, explicitly targeting long-context efficiency.
解码策略优化: REFORM pairs its long-context handling with an early exit strategy to boost inference efficiency on top of the cache management.

codex_annotation.notes: Long-context inference framework pairing cache compression/recomputation with early-exit decoding for LLMs.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是长上下文推理框架，重点在压缩与重计算 KV cache，以及 early exit 和跨层上下文表征；不属于典型解码策略优化。

general: 标题与摘要都表明目标是针对边缘推理场景加速线性递归神经网络，强调硬件友好的优化以降低延迟和能耗。
模型压缩: “Accelerating Linear Recurrent Neural Networks for the Edge with Unstructured Sparsity” 明确将无结构稀疏性作为核心手段，即通过模型压缩提升推理速度。

codex_annotation.notes: 面向资源受限边缘设备的流式推理优化。

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心聚焦边缘部署加速与资源约束下的硬件感知优化；“非结构化稀疏”直接对应模型压缩信号。

general: LLaVA-Mini introduces modality pre-fusion to fuse visual information into text tokens in advance, thereby facilitating the extreme compression of vision tokens fed to the LLM backbone into one token.
上下文与缓存优化: Experiments across 11 image-based and 7 video-based benchmarks show LLaVA-Mini outperforms LLaVA-v1.5 with just 1 vision token instead of 576, and efficiency analyses report 77% lower FLOPs, responses within 40 ms, and processing over 10,000 video frames on 24 GB GPUs, highlighting explicit reduction of context-token overhead.

codex_annotation.notes: Token compression via modality pre-fusion is the primary optimization; no other preference labels are claimed by the abstract.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是通过模态预融合与单视觉 token 设计降低多模态推理开销，明显属于多模态 LLM；偏好上更直接对应上下文 token 压缩与模型结构侧推理优化，而非系统调度或算子内核层优化。

general: PM-KVQ提出针对长CoT大模型的渐进式混合精度KV cache量化策略，结合块级bit-width调节和位置插值校准以降低累计量化误差并适配长上下文数据，目标是在相同内存预算下保持推理质量。([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.18610?utm_source=openai))
模型压缩: 该论文的核心贡献是KV cache的后训练量化，通过渐进式bit-width降低及块级精度分配、校准策略在保留更多关键块精度的同时压缩KV cache，从而在推理中减小显存占用且不显著退化性能。([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.18610?utm_source=openai))

codex_annotation.notes: 专注KV cache的量化压缩与校准，面向长CoT推理场景。

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦长链路推理LLM中的KV Cache量化，通过渐进式混合精度压缩缓存，直接对应上下文/缓存优化与模型压缩。

general: Meeting service-level objectives (SLOs) in LLM serving is critical, but managing the high variability in load presents a significant challenge ... NestedFP provides a flexible platform for dynamic, SLO-aware precision selection.
算子与内核优化: By leveraging a compact data format for the overlay and a specialized GEMM kernel optimized for this format, NestedFP ensures minimal degradation in both model quality and inference throughput across both FP8 and FP16 modes.
模型压缩: This paper proposes NestedFP ... by overlaying FP8 parameters onto FP16 parameters, allowing both models to share the same FP16 memory footprint.

codex_annotation.notes: NestedFP enables memory-efficient FP8/FP16 dual-precision LLM serving via a compact overlay format and matching GEMM kernel so SLO-aware precision switching keeps throughput and quality stable.

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦LLM推理服务中的双精度切换与内存复用，核心贡献覆盖SLO感知调度、专用GEMM内核以及以共享FP16占用实现FP8/FP16双模型支持的压缩式表示；未见与上下文或KV缓存优化直接相关的内容。

general: Cake introduces a KV cache loading system that balances computation and I/O to reduce Time to First Token for prefix caching.
上下文与缓存优化: Cake dynamically balances KV cache computation and loading to reduce redundant computation and latency in prefix caching for long-context LLM inference.
系统与调度优化: Cake’s bidirectional scheduling and adaptive mechanism optimally utilizes both compute and I/O resources and handles non-prefix caching requests to improve throughput.

codex_annotation.notes: 2.6× TTFT reduction across hardware, datasets, and storage conditions demonstrates practical acceleration for long-context LLM inference.

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦长上下文 LLM 推理中的 KV cache 复用与加载，核心贡献同时落在缓存优化与系统调度优化。

general: Layer tying and Recursive Transformer loops convert pretrained LLMs into smaller models with shared parameters while preserving performance, and Relaxed Recursive Transformers add depth-wise LoRA to keep compactness.
模型压缩: We revisit layer tying as parameter sharing in Transformers to create Recursive Transformers that reuse a single block of unique layers, and Relaxed Recursive Transformers introduce depth-wise LoRA to improve flexibility while keeping the model compact, enabling smaller recursive variants to match larger counterparts.
系统与调度优化: Continuous Depth-wise Batching, enabled by the Recursive Transformer together with early exiting, is proposed as a new inference paradigm that theoretically yields 2-3× throughput gains.

codex_annotation.notes: Parameter sharing plus depth-wise LoRA drives the model-compression gain, while the new batch+early-exit inference paradigm targets serving throughput improvements.

human_annotation.notes: ['核心贡献是通过层共享与depth-wise LoRA构造更紧凑的Recursive Transformer，明显属于模型压缩。', 'Continuous Depth-wise Batching配合early exiting直接面向推理吞吐优化，可归入系统与调度优化。', '摘要未涉及算子/内核级实现细节，也不属于解码策略优化。']

general: We introduce GateSkip, a simple residual-stream gating mechanism that enables token-wise layer skipping in decoder-only LMs, ranking tokens by the gate and skipping low-importance ones using a per-layer budget to save up to 15% compute while retaining >90% accuracy.
The method fits smoothly on pretrained models and combines easily with quantization, pruning, and self-speculative decoding, giving insight into transformer information flow.
模型结构侧推理优化: Each Attention/MLP branch gets a sigmoid-linear gate that compresses the branch’s output before it re-enters the residual stream, enabling token-wise layer skipping during inference with a learned gate budget and stable fine-tuning on top of pretrained models.

codex_annotation.notes: GateSkip’s main contribution is the residual gating structure that adaptively skips layers per token, so model-structure-level inference optimization is the clearest positive signal.

human_annotation.notes: 工作核心是通过残差门控实现按 token 的层跳过，属于模型结构侧的推理计算优化，而非解码策略本身。

上下文与缓存优化: HiRED leverages the attention of the CLS token in the vision transformer to assess each partition and allocate an optimal token budget before selecting the most informative visual tokens to forward to the LLM.

codex_annotation.notes: Token-dropping within a fixed budget trades off visual-token count to boost throughput, latency, and memory efficiency for high-resolution VLM inference.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是针对高分辨率VLM推理阶段的视觉token裁剪与预算分配，属于模型结构侧推理优化，而非缓存、调度或算子内核优化。

general: Abstract introduces Infinite Pixel Learning (IPL) to fuse UHD multi-exposure dynamic scenes in real time on a single consumer-grade GPU by slicing input sequences, adding an attention cache, and compressing that cache to manage the long-sequence data stream.
上下文与缓存优化: The method develops an attention cache analogous to the KV cache for processing an infinite data stream and explicitly adds attention cache compression to reduce the cache storage burden on the device while keeping UHD fusion real-time (>40 fps).

codex_annotation.notes: 命中上下文与缓存优化是因为摘要明确把 attention cache 和其压缩作为主要贡献，直接对应本偏好标签。

human_annotation.notes: 该工作本体属于计算机视觉中的UHD多曝光图像融合；与偏好最直接相关的是长序列处理中的缓存与压缩机制，未见算子/内核级优化的明确证据。

模型压缩: Abstract frames the contribution as a pruning/sparsification method: it introduces customized Visual Prompts in the VPNs framework to upgrade neural network sparsification and reports substantial gains over state-of-the-art pruning algorithms across architectures and datasets.
general: The paper adopts a novel data-model co-design perspective to jointly learn important model topology and input data so as to promote superior weight sparsity, with systematic investigations of how different visual prompts impact model pruning.

codex_annotation.notes: The work targets vision-model sparsification via data-model co-design rather than serving/system optimization, so only the 模型压缩 label is supported by the abstract evidence.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是计算机视觉场景下的网络剪枝/稀疏化，通过视觉提示优化稀疏子网发现，明显属于模型压缩，不属于 LLM 上下文缓存或系统调度优化。

negative: 摘要只说明面向实时图形的轻量级超分辨率以减少计算资源，但未具体描述解码策略、缓存、系统调度、算子/内核、结构推理或模型压缩等明确优化方法。

codex_annotation.notes: 摘要侧重应用场景与资源压力，未给出明确的偏好标签对应贡献。

human_annotation.notes: 论文主题是面向实时计算机图形的图像超分辨率，属于计算机视觉方向。摘要强调轻量化与降低计算开销，但未明确出现解码、缓存、调度、算子内核、压缩等具体推理优化技术，因此不标为正例；可视为与模型结构侧轻量化目标相关的域内样本。

general: ST3 consists of Progressive Visual Token Pruning (PVTP) to eliminate inattentive visual tokens and Visual Token Annealing (VTA) to dynamically reduce visual tokens per layer, delivering ~2× faster inference while using ~30% KV cache memory compared to original LLaVA.
上下文与缓存优化: PVTP removes redundant visual tokens across layers and VTA shrinks token count as generation progresses, directly trimming the KV cache footprint and accelerating inference without retraining.

codex_annotation.notes: 根据摘要的主要贡献判断，对应上下文/缓存优化标签。

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦多模态大模型推理加速，核心是解码过程中的视觉 token 裁剪与 KV cache 降低；不属于模型压缩训练范式。

general: MPQ-DM targets diffusion models in resource-constrained scenarios by defining a mixed-precision quantization pipeline that keeps 2–4 bit models accurate despite heavy discretization.
模型压缩: Outlier-Driven Mixed Quantization quantifies outlier channels with kurtosis to allocate intra-layer bit-widths and Time-Smoothed Relation Distillation aligns quantized and full-precision latents, enabling significant FID gains under extremely low bit-width settings.

codex_annotation.notes: Quantization-centric contributions are framed as the primary optimization for low-bit diffusion deployment.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是扩散模型在极低比特下的量化压缩与精度恢复，属于 VLM/Diffusion 方向下的模型压缩。

上下文与缓存优化: Token compression techniques, such as token merging and pruning, are essential for alleviating the substantial computational burden caused by the proliferation of tokens within attention mechanisms.
The proposed method leverages a multimodal, prompt-centric methodology...to efficiently eliminate redundant tokens while preserving those rich in information.
When applied to multimodal diffusion models, MPTM maintains high-quality output while achieving a 2.9-fold increase in throughput, highlighting its versatility.

codex_annotation.notes: 摘要强调通过多模态 prompt 感知的 token 合并来减少冗余 token、保留有效信息，并显著提升 diffusion 生成任务的吞吐，直接支撑上下文/缓存优化。

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是面向 diffusion/multimodal diffusion 的 token merging 与冗余 token 消减，属于生成模型中的压缩式推理加速；未见系统调度或缓存层面的主要贡献。

general: BigMac introduces a communication-efficient MoE structure aimed at reducing the All-to-All overhead that currently bottlenecks fine-grained MoE deployments during training and inference.
系统与调度优化: The abstract emphasizes that the All-to-All communication becomes a bottleneck especially when more experts are involved in fine-grained structures, and BigMac targets that heavier communication overhead to speed up training and inference.

codex_annotation.notes: The work centers on reducing MoE communication cost so training/inference can run faster, which is a system/scheduling optimization.

human_annotation.notes: 论文面向LLM中的MoE结构，核心问题是降低专家激活带来的All-to-All通信开销，并通过结构设计提升训练与推理效率。

general: Introduce Singular Value Scaling (SVS) to refine pruned weights for GAN and Diffusion models, improving initialization and speeding fine-tuning without extra training costs.
模型压缩: SVS minimizes disparities between singular values of pruned weights to guide compressed generative models toward better solutions, boosting compression performance across StyleGAN2/3 and DDPM.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是生成模型压缩，方法通过奇异值缩放改进剪枝权重初始化，覆盖GAN与Diffusion；不属于系统与调度优化。

general: ScaleOT frames privacy-utility-scalable offsite tuning by sharing compressed emulators composed of selected original layers and lightweight harmonizers so data owners can tune downstream tasks while keeping both model and data private.
模型压缩: ScaleOT’s layerwise lossy compression uses reinforcement learning to assess each layer’s importance and swaps in harmonizers, enabling tailored emulators across scales.
A selective rank reduction method further compresses original LLM layers to boost privacy with negligible utility degradation, matching full fine-tuning performance.

codex_annotation.notes: Layer-aware compression plus rank reduction targets privacy-heavy LLM tuning; harmonizers blend original layers with lightweight replacements under RL guidance.

human_annotation.notes: 论文主体是面向LLM的离线调优压缩框架，核心贡献集中在分层有损压缩、层替换与低秩压缩，明显属于模型压缩；“系统与调度优化”证据不足，未纳入。

general: Apollo-Forecast pairs an Anti-Aliasing Quantization Module with a Race Decoding technique to tackle aliasing distortion and long inference times when applying language models to time-series forecasting, delivering 1.9X–2.7X faster inference than baselines while improving zero-shot metrics such as WQL and MASE by 35.41% and 18.99%. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.12226))
模型压缩: The Anti-Aliasing Quantization Module encodes sequences into tokens while reducing high-frequency noise in the signals, thereby improving signal fidelity and quantization efficiency. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.12226))
解码策略优化: Race Decoding runs a draft model to enable parallel processing and results integration, markedly accelerating inference speed for long-term predictions, especially on large-scale models. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.12226))

codex_annotation.notes: AAQM and RD are presented as the framework’s two main contributions, so both compression and decoding-strategy optimizations are justified by the abstract’s emphasis on those methods. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.12226))

human_annotation.notes: 论文面向语言模型在时间序列预测中的混叠与推理速度问题，标题直接指向推理阶段效率/结构改进；给定摘要片段不足以支持缓存、调度、内核或压缩方向。

上下文与缓存优化: Serving LLMs requires substantial KV cache memory that grows with sequence length, so QJL compresses the cache via a Johnson-Lindenstrauss transform plus sign-bit quantization, eliminating per-block constants and reducing KV cache size fivefold to 3 bits without hurting accuracy.

codex_annotation.notes: 主要贡献是去除量化常数、直接压缩 KV cache，从而显著节省内存并保持精度，CUDA kernel 只是实现细节支持。

human_annotation.notes: ['核心贡献是 KV cache 量化，直接对应上下文与缓存优化。', '量化压缩方法本身属于模型压缩范畴。', '文中包含 lightweight CUDA kernel 与更快 runtime，可归入算子与内核优化，但不宜扩展到系统与调度优化。']

general: The emergence of long-context text applications utilizing large language models (LLMs) has presented significant scalability challenges, particularly in memory footprint.
The linear growth of the Key-Value (KV) cache ... can significantly increase memory usage and may prevent models from functioning properly in memory-constrained environments.
上下文与缓存优化: We propose Cache Sparse Representation (CSR), which converts the dense Key-Value cache tensor into sparse indexes and weights, offering a more memory-efficient representation during LLM inference.
Our extensive experiments demonstrate that CSR matches the performance of state-of-the-art KV cache quantization algorithms while ensuring robust functionality in memory-constrained environments.

codex_annotation.notes: CSR focuses on reducing KV cache memory via sparse representation and neural dictionary generation for LLM inference.

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦 LLM 推理阶段的 KV cache 稀疏表示与量化压缩，在长上下文和内存受限场景下降低缓存占用。

general: I will present theoretically-guaranteed scalable and efficient probabilistic inference ... introduce a new compute paradigm ... that leverages modern accelerators, specifically low-precision and sparsity, to significantly speed up inference while preserving accuracy.
模型压缩: Introduce a new compute paradigm for probabilistic inference that leverages modern accelerators, specifically low-precision and sparsity, to significantly speed up inference while preserving accuracy.

codex_annotation.notes: Abstract emphasizes a compression-style compute paradigm (low-precision and sparsity) as the main efficiency contribution.

human_annotation.notes: ['主题核心是可扩展高效的概率推断，覆盖贝叶斯深度学习与生成建模，不是以 LLM 为唯一主对象。', '“low-precision and sparsity”直接对应压缩/稀疏化方向；“leverages modern accelerators”体现系统实现与推理加速取向。', '离散域利用梯度信息进行更有方向的探索属于推断算法改进，但不直接落入给定偏好标签集合。']

general: Title: Not All Bits Are Equal: How Model Scale Changes Memory-Optimal Reasoning

Abstract: While 4-bit quantization has emerged as a memory-optimal choice for non-reasoning models and zero-shot tasks across scales, we show that this universal prescription fails for reasoning models, where KV cache rather than model size can dominate memory.
negative: Abstract frames the work as a diagnosis of when quantization vs KV cache dominates memory for reasoning models rather than the introduction and validation of a new optimization technique, so no preference label is clearly supported.

codex_annotation.notes: Characterizes memory trade-offs in LLM reasoning rather than proposing a new optimization, so it does not hit any of the preferred optimization labels.

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦推理模型的内存最优配置，核心证据直接涉及 KV cache 与量化位宽选择，属于缓存/上下文优化与模型压缩交叉主题。

general: LLM inference is memory-heavy because of large KV caches, and NSNQuant introduces calibration-free low-bit vector quantization that applies Normalize-Shift-Normalize with a Hadamard transform to align tokens to a standard normal, enabling robust quantization with reusable codebooks and throughput gains. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.18231?utm_source=openai))
上下文与缓存优化: NSNQuant directly quantizes the KV cache without calibration, reducing its memory footprint while delivering up to 3× higher throughput than full-precision baselines. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.18231?utm_source=openai))

codex_annotation.notes: The paper’s core contribution is a calibration-free pipeline for compressing the KV cache, so the cache/context optimization label is well-supported. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.18231?utm_source=openai))

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦 LLM 推理阶段的 KV cache 低比特量化，以降低缓存带来的内存开销，属于缓存优化与模型压缩交叉方向。

general: Accelerating large language model (LLM) inference is critical for real-world deployments requiring high throughput and low latency.
算子与内核优化: We develop Selective Head Attention with hardware-efficient, sparsity-aware GPU kernels, delivering up to 2.2× end-to-end speedups for models like OPT, LLaMA-2 & 3, Qwen, Mistral across various batch sizes and sequence lengths without compromising accuracy.
模型结构侧推理优化: Polar Sparsity introduces Selective Head Attention, highlighting a shift where attention head sparsity remains stable even as batch size and sequence length grow, allowing contextual sparsity to scale effectively.

codex_annotation.notes: Polar Sparsity proves contextual sparsity can scale to large batches by focusing on sparse attention heads and matching kernel support, enabling practical high-throughput LLM deployment.

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦大批量 LLM 推理加速，核心贡献在注意力头稀疏与稀疏感知 GPU kernel；未直接讨论 KV cache/上下文管理，也不是典型模型压缩或调度论文。

模型压缩: Neural network pruning is a promising technique to mitigate the excessive computational and memory requirements of large language models (LLMs).

human_annotation.notes: 标题与摘要明确聚焦于LLM剪枝/稀疏化，属于模型压缩方向。

general: Achieving high-fidelity audio compression while preserving perceptual quality across diverse audio types remains a significant challenge in Neural Audio Coding; MUFFIN introduces psychoacoustically guided multi-band frequency reconstruction to optimize bitrate allocation and fidelity.
模型压缩: Multi-Band Spectral Residual Vector Quantization quantizes latent speech across different frequency bands to allocate bitrate efficiently and preserve reconstruction quality, establishing MUFFIN as a neural psychoacoustic coding system.

codex_annotation.notes: Extensive evaluations on LibriTTS, IEMOCAP, GTZAN, and BBC show MUFFIN surpasses prior neural audio codecs, and a high-compression variant reaches 12.5 kHz while retaining quality.

human_annotation.notes: 该论文核心是神经音频编码与心理声学压缩，主对象应归为“语音 / 音频”。摘要未体现允许标签中的推理优化或模型压缩取向，因此偏好标签置空。

general: Abstract describes a serving system for multi-tenant MoE LLMs that reduces memory via similarity-based expert consolidation and runtime partial reconfiguration while keeping throughput comparable to serving a single model and TTFT overhead low.
系统与调度优化: The system shares similar experts across fine-tuned MoE LLMs and dynamically replaces non-expert layers per request so multiple models can run on one GPU with competitive output quality and an 85% reduction in turnaround time versus MIG.

codex_annotation.notes: Focused on serving multiple MoE LLMs on a single GPU via consolidation and runtime reconfiguration.

human_annotation.notes: 论文核心是多租户单卡上的多MoE-LLM高效服务，重点在服务系统设计与MoE结构级重构，不直接聚焦缓存、解码或底层算子内核优化。

general: SCBench introduces a comprehensive benchmark focused on evaluating long-context methods from a KV cache perspective (generation, compression, retrieval, loading) rather than delivering a novel optimization method.

The abstract frames the work as an extensive analysis of existing long-context solutions and draws conclusions about their memory/computation behavior, showing it is an evaluation/benchmark study instead of proposing a new contribution for the listed preference labels.

codex_annotation.notes: Benchmark/analysis work, so no new optimization aligned with the required labels.

human_annotation.notes: ['论文核心是面向长上下文LLM的KV cache中心化评测与分析，属于LLM方向。', '偏好标签同时覆盖缓存复用/加载/检索，混合架构与稀疏机制，以及量化/压缩相关方法。']

上下文与缓存优化: Abstract: Dynamic-LLaVA dynamically sparsifies vision-language context during prefill and decoding, halving decoding computation and KV-cache memory.

codex_annotation.notes: Covers both prefill and decoding modes to maintain generation quality while improving efficiency.

human_annotation.notes: 论文聚焦多模态大模型推理阶段的视觉-语言上下文稀疏化，核心收益体现在降低解码期计算与 KV cache/上下文内存开销，最匹配“上下文与缓存优化”。

general: Preble 是首个面向 prompt 共享的分布式 LLM serving 平台，旨在通过 prompt 复用降低长 prompt 请求的延迟。([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.00023))
上下文与缓存优化: 摘要指出 Preble 设计的分布式调度系统联合优化 KV 状态复用与算力负载，以实现 prompt 共享的复用。([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.00023))
系统与调度优化: 同段摘要进一步说明新调度算法与分层调度机制在兼顾负载均衡与 KV 重用方面发挥核心作用。([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.00023))

codex_annotation.notes: E2 调度算法在 4-8 GPU 集群上将 avg latency 提升 1.5-14.5×、p99 latency 提升 2-10×，体现 prompt-aware load balancing 与共享策略的配合价值。([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2407.00023))

human_annotation.primary_research_object: AI 系统 / 基础设施

general: 提出静态 8-bit per-tensor SSM 量化，针对 selective scan 输入激活和输出 outlier 进行处理，使得大型 SSM 在云端与边缘设备上保持准确率的同时更易部署。
量化后的 Mamba 2.8B 与 Jamba 52B 在 NVIDIA Orin Nano 8G 与更大模型上分别实现了 1.72× 的推理延迟提升和约 1% 的精度降幅，说明方法可扩展。
模型压缩: 通过抑制 selective SSM 的输入峰值并在 Hadamard 变换空间量化输出激活，开发了专门针对 SSM 的 8-bit 权重-激活量化方案，并利用硬件加速进一步降低延迟。

codex_annotation.notes: 聚焦 SSM 量化以提升 LLM 推理效率，保持准确率的同时适配云边部署。

general: EPD Disaggregation decouples encoding, prefill, and decode into dedicated resources for LMM serving and demonstrates major gains in memory, batch size, KV cache capacity, and SLO/TTFT compared to monolithic systems.
上下文与缓存优化: The framework “caches multimedia tokens for efficient transfer” and delivers “2.2× larger KV caches,” highlighting explicit context/cache management aimed at inference efficiency.
系统与调度优化: EPD Disaggregation introduces “a module for optimal resource allocation for disaggregated serving” plus “a novel role-switching method to handle changing workload characteristics,” signaling new system/scheduling mechanisms.
It “separates the encoding, prefill, and decode stages onto dedicated resources” and “parallelizes the encoding load within a request,” showing serving-level orchestration improvements.

上下文与缓存优化: Large-language-model inference with long contexts often produces key–value (KV) caches whose footprint exceeds GPU memory, so HiFC introduces a DRAM-free swapping scheme that stores KV pages on SSD pseudo-SLC regions and uses GPU Direct Storage for direct transfers, keeping throughput comparable to DRAM-based swapping while cutting memory expansion costs.

codex_annotation.notes: HiFC’s primary contribution is a KV cache swapping system tailored for long-context LLM inference, so only 上下文与缓存优化 is supported by the abstract evidence.

general: title=EPIC: Efficient Position-Independent Caching for Serving Large Language Models
Context caching improves serving performance by reusing Key-Value (KV) vectors, the intermediate representations of tokens that are repeated across requests.

Existing context caching requires exact prefix matches across requests, limiting reuse in few-shot learning and retrieval-augmented generation where immutable content remains unchanged but is preceded by varying prefixes.
上下文与缓存优化: Position-Independent Caching (PIC) addresses this issue by enabling modular reuse of the KV vectors regardless of prefixes.
EPIC introduces the LegoLink algorithm to mitigate the inappropriate “attention sink” effect at every document beginning, maintaining accuracy with minimal computation.
EPIC achieves up to 8× improvements in Time-To-First-Token (TTFT) and 7× throughput gains over existing systems, with negligible or no accuracy loss.

codex_annotation.notes: 核心贡献在于 LLM Serving 的位置无关 context cache，解决了 prefix mismatch 限制并通过 LegoLink 保障精度，是典型的上下文与缓存优化。

general: NANOMIND decomposes LMMs into modular “bricks”, maps each to its ideal accelerator, and combines customized hardware, system-level scheduling, and low-bit kernels to run entirely on-device with higher throughput and power efficiency while bypassing CPU bottlenecks via token-aware buffer management. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf/8231a92d571087e8e515651335932785938e41bd.pdf))
系统与调度优化: The framework performs module-level dynamic offloading across accelerators on UMA SoCs and uses a layer-aware scheduler plus zero-copy buffer manager to make per-layer placement decisions based on battery, memory, and latency needs, immediately releasing resources after execution. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf/8231a92d571087e8e515651335932785938e41bd.pdf))

codex_annotation.notes: The prototype runs LLaVA-OneVision-qwen2-05B for nearly 20.8 hours on battery, showing the practical effectiveness of the scheduling strategy. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf/8231a92d571087e8e515651335932785938e41bd.pdf))

codex_annotation.primary_research_object: AI 系统 / 基础设施

general: Multi model inference, where multiple task-specialized models collaborate to solve complex real-world problems, has recently emerged as a prominent paradigm, particularly in the development of agentic AI systems.
However, in such scenarios, each model must maintain its own Key-Value (KV) cache for the identical prompt, leading to explosive memory consumption.
上下文与缓存优化: However, in such scenarios, each model must maintain its own Key-Value (KV) cache for the identical prompt, leading to explosive memory consumption.

codex_annotation.notes: 聚焦于多模型协同推理时的 KV cache 复用以节省内存。

human_annotation.primary_research_object: AI 系统 / 基础设施

上下文与缓存优化: Reducing visual redundancy at the image-encoder stage not only speeds up the encoder but also lightens the LLM workload, so we jointly optimize LVLM components and introduce a token-merging strategy that recycles useful information from discarded tokens, yielding up to 2× throughput and 4× prefilling speedups.
general: iLLaVA consistently improves both image and video understanding tasks and lets a larger model surpass a smaller one in accuracy and efficiency through the new merging steps, with detailed visualizations showing how each LVLM component supports efficient computation.

codex_annotation.notes: iLLaVA’s encoder-stage token merging is explicitly presented as the key optimization to reduce input tokens entering the LLM while preserving accuracy, matching the long-context/cache optimization preference.

模型压缩: We introduce Delta-guided Two stage Pruning (DTP), a method that progressively reduces token redundancy through selective pruning at early layer and complete pruning at late layer.

codex_annotation.notes: 摘要明确将 DTP 描述为通过层间 token 剪枝减少冗余以提升 Mamba 多模态 LLM 推理效率。

general: SVDQuant proposes a new 4-bit quantization paradigm that absorbs outliers via a low-rank branch and offloads residuals to a low-bit branch, easing aggressive quantization of diffusion models while preserving quality.
模型压缩: The work aims to accelerate diffusion models by quantizing both weights and activations to 4 bits, shifting activation outliers into weights, and using a high-precision SVD low-rank branch alongside a low-bit branch to stabilize the aggressive quantization.
算子与内核优化: To avoid the overhead of the low-rank branch, the Nunchaku inference engine fuses its kernels with those of the low-bit branch, cutting redundant memory access and enabling the fused implementation to retain the quantization speedup.

codex_annotation.notes: Reports 3.5× memory reduction on 12B FLUX.1, 3.0× speedup over W4A16 on RTX 4090, and 3.1× over W4A16 with NVFP4 on RTX 5090; code available in mit-han-lab repositories.

general: Bit-DGDM 是针对离散图扩散模型的后训练量化框架，通过建模激活异常点及低秩分解加速推理，使 FP32 基线在内存使用上最多降低 2.8 倍并实现最高 2.5 倍加速。
模型压缩: 引入稀疏-密集激活量化（自适应选择全精度阈值，对其余部分量化到低位）和低秩分解+α-稀疏矩阵以建模异常点，从而实现低比特推理且保持性能。

codex_annotation.notes: 以量化为核心贡献，主攻 DGDM 推理压缩与加速。

模型压缩: Abstract claims that the paper provides the first mathematical proof that sparsity and quantization are non-orthogonal and that the order of applying these compression methods as well as their compounded errors critically affect accuracy.

The authors demonstrate across OPT, LLaMA, ViT, and ResNet families how applying quantization before sparsity can remove significant tensor elements and how their combined use without care harms accuracy, offering best-practice insights for deploying compression on resource-constrained platforms.

codex_annotation.notes: Paper’s core contribution is analyzing and guiding the combined use of sparsity and quantization for model compression, not introducing new decoding/system/kernel techniques.

general: FreeKV is a training-free algorithm-system co-optimization framework that introduces speculative retrieval plus hybrid CPU/GPU KV layouts and double-buffered streamed recall to hide selection/recall latency, yielding near-lossless accuracy and up to 13× speedup over prior KV retrieval methods. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf/f397c368f2e7e8e1bf99b112e3a8842193fc9a41.pdf))
上下文与缓存优化: Speculative retrieval shifts KV selection and recall out of the critical path via step-wise reuse with fine-grained correction, while hybrid KV layouts and double-buffered streamed recall eliminate fragmented transfers to optimize long-context KV cache handling. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf/f397c368f2e7e8e1bf99b112e3a8842193fc9a41.pdf))

codex_annotation.notes: The paper centers on improving KV cache retrieval efficiency for long-context LLM inference by overlapping recall with computation and hiding CPU/GPU transfer latency while maintaining accuracy. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf/f397c368f2e7e8e1bf99b112e3a8842193fc9a41.pdf))

general: Presents an automated benchmarking framework to evaluate compressed LLMs on mobile devices (resource efficiency, energy, throughput, and harmful output) rather than proposing new optimization techniques.

codex_annotation.notes: Evaluation study focused on comparing quantized models across mobile hardware constraints, not introducing novel optimizations.

general: ChanMix is a channel-aware mixed-precision quantization framework for the KV cache that reallocates bits across retrieval-sensitive, outlier, and robust channels, pairing its low-bit support with custom Triton kernels to keep long-context performance intact while shrinking memory use. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf?id=yjr2jX41qO))
上下文与缓存优化: The sensitivity-aware bit allocation deliberately targets KV cache channels so that crucial long-context retrieval channels retain higher precision while weaker channels shrink to 2-bit, directly optimizing KV cache memory for long-context inference. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf?id=yjr2jX41qO))

Benchmarks on NIAH, RULER, and InfiniteBench report ≥5-point accuracy gains versus uniform quantization plus a 2.3× larger batch size and 1.5× longer context capacity, showing concrete improvements to KV cache scalability. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf?id=yjr2jX41qO))

codex_annotation.notes: Focusing on KV cache quantization for long-context LLM inference makes the work a context-and-cache optimization (not a broader system/kernel change), so the positive preference label is 上下文与缓存优化. ([openreview.net](https://openreview.net/pdf?id=yjr2jX41qO))
